summary.brief: Synacor Zimbra Collaboration Suite (ZCS) added to CISA KEV — confirmed in-the-wild exploitation. · 10 new critical disclosures — review patch status on exposed services.
bullets: Synacor Zimbra Collaboration Suite (ZCS) added to CISA KEV — confirmed in-the-wild exploitation.
10 new critical disclosures — review patch status on exposed services.

digest.description: fastping.c in MRLG (aka Multi-Router Looking Glass) before 5.5.0 allows remote attackers to cause an arbitrary memory write and memory corruption.
digest.title: Multi-Router Looking Glass (MRLG) Buffer Overflow Vulnerability

cve.cisaRequiredAction: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable.
cve.cisaVulnerabilityName: Multi-Router Looking Glass (MRLG) Buffer Overflow Vulnerability

descriptions.value: fastping.c in MRLG (aka Multi-Router Looking Glass) before 5.5.0 allows remote attackers to cause an arbitrary memory write and memory corruption.
Fastping.c en MRLG (también conocido como Multi-Router Looking Glass) en versiones anteriores a 5.5.0 permite a atacantes remotos provocar una escritura de memoria arbitraria y corrupción de memoria.

digest.description: WeGIA is a web manager for charitable institutions. An SQL Injection vulnerability was identified in the /html/funcionario/profile_funcionario.php endpoint. The id_funcionario parameter is not properly sanitized or validated before being used in a SQL query, allowing an unauthenticated attacker to inject arbitrary SQL commands. The vulnerability is fixed in 3.4.3.
digest.title: wegia wegia SQL Injection

descriptions.value: WeGIA is a web manager for charitable institutions. An SQL Injection vulnerability was identified in the /html/funcionario/profile_funcionario.php endpoint. The id_funcionario parameter is not properly sanitized or validated before being used in a SQL query, allowing an unauthenticated attacker to inject arbitrary SQL commands. The vulnerability is fixed in 3.4.3.

WeGIA es un gestor web para instituciones benéficas. Se identificó una vulnerabilidad de inyección SQL en el endpoint /html/funcionario/profile_funcionario.php. El parámetro id_funcionario no se depuró ni validó correctamente antes de usarse en una consulta SQL, lo que permitió que un atacante no autenticado inyectara comandos SQL arbitrarios. La vulnerabilidad se corrigió en la versión 3.4.3.

digest.description: LuaJIT through 2.1 and OpenRusty luajit2 before v2.1-20240626 have a stack-buffer-overflow in lj_strfmt_wfnum in lj_strfmt_num.c.
digest.title: luajit luajit

descriptions.value: LuaJIT through 2.1 and OpenRusty luajit2 before v2.1-20240626 have a stack-buffer-overflow in lj_strfmt_wfnum in lj_strfmt_num.c.
LuaJIT hasta 2.1 tiene un desbordamiento de búfer de pila en lj_strfmt_wfnum en lj_strfmt_num.c.

digest.description: The mailSend function in the isMail transport in PHPMailer before 5.2.18 might allow remote attackers to pass extra parameters to the mail command and consequently execute arbitrary code via a \" (backslash double quote) in a crafted Sender property.
digest.title: PHPMailer Command Injection Vulnerability

cve.cisaRequiredAction: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable.

descriptions.value: The mailSend function in the isMail transport in PHPMailer before 5.2.18 might allow remote attackers to pass extra parameters to the mail command and consequently execute arbitrary code via a \" (backslash double quote) in a crafted Sender property.

La función mailSend en el transporte isMail en PHPMailer en versiones anteriores a 5.2.18 podrían permitir a atacantes remotos pasar parámetros extra al comando mail y consecuentemente ejecutar código arbitrario a través de una \" (barra invertida comillas dobles) en una propiedad Sender manipulada.

digest.description: There is a File Content Disclosure vulnerability in Action View <5.2.2.1, <5.1.6.2, <5.0.7.2, <4.2.11.1 and v3 where specially crafted accept headers can cause contents of arbitrary files on the target system's filesystem to be exposed.
digest.title: Rails Ruby on Rails Path Traversal Vulnerability

cve.cisaRequiredAction: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable.
cve.cisaVulnerabilityName: Rails Ruby on Rails Path Traversal Vulnerability

descriptions.value: There is a File Content Disclosure vulnerability in Action View <5.2.2.1, <5.1.6.2, <5.0.7.2, <4.2.11.1 and v3 where specially crafted accept headers can cause contents of arbitrary files on the target system's filesystem to be exposed.

Existe una vulnerabilidad de Divulgación del contenido del archivo en la Vista de acción versión anterior a .2.2.1, versión anterior a 1.6.2, versión anterior a 5.0.7.2, versión anterior a 4.2.11.1 y v3, donde los encabezados de aceptación especialmente diseñados pueden exponer el contenido de archivos arbitrarios en el sistema de archivos del sistema de destino. .

digest.description: Zimbra Collaboration Suite before 8.6 patch 13, 8.7.x before 8.7.11 patch 10, and 8.8.x before 8.8.10 patch 7 or 8.8.x before 8.8.11 patch 3 allows SSRF via the ProxyServlet component.
digest.title: Synacor Zimbra Collaboration Suite (ZCS) Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) Vulnerability

cve.cisaRequiredAction: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable.
cve.cisaVulnerabilityName: Synacor Zimbra Collaboration Suite (ZCS) Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) Vulnerability

descriptions.value: Zimbra Collaboration Suite before 8.6 patch 13, 8.7.x before 8.7.11 patch 10, and 8.8.x before 8.8.10 patch 7 or 8.8.x before 8.8.11 patch 3 allows SSRF via the ProxyServlet component.

Zimbra Collaboration Suite anterior de la versión 8.6 path 13, versión 8.7.x anterior de la 8.7.11 path 10, y versión 8.8.x anterior de la 8.8.10 path 7 u versión 8.8.x anterior de la 8.8.11 path 3, permite vulnerabilidad de tipo SSRF por medio del componente ProxyServlet.

digest.description: LuaJIT through 2.1 and OpenRusty luajit2 before v2.1-20240314 have an out-of-bounds read in the stack-overflow handler in lj_state.c.
digest.title: luajit luajit Out-of-Bounds Write

descriptions.value: LuaJIT through 2.1 and OpenRusty luajit2 before v2.1-20240314 have an out-of-bounds read in the stack-overflow handler in lj_state.c.
LuaJIT hasta la versión 2.1 tiene una lectura fuera de los límites en el controlador de desbordamiento de pila en lj_state.c

digest.description: JobCenter through 7e7b0b2 allows account takeover via the password reset feature because SERVER_NAME is not configured and thus a reset depends on the Host HTTP header.
digest.title: JobCenter through 7e7b0b2 allows account takeover via the password reset feature because SERVER_NAME is not configured and thus a reset d...

descriptions.value: JobCenter through 7e7b0b2 allows account takeover via the password reset feature because SERVER_NAME is not configured and thus a reset depends on the Host HTTP header.

JobCenter a través de 7e7b0b2 permite la toma de control de cuenta a través de la función de restablecimiento de contraseña porque SERVER_NAME no está configurado y, por lo tanto, un restablecimiento depende del encabezado HTTP del Host.

digest.description: fblog through 983bede allows account takeover via the password reset feature because SERVER_NAME is not configured and thus a reset depends on the Host HTTP header.
digest.title: fblog through 983bede allows account takeover via the password reset feature because SERVER_NAME is not configured and thus a reset depen...

descriptions.value: fblog through 983bede allows account takeover via the password reset feature because SERVER_NAME is not configured and thus a reset depends on the Host HTTP header.

fblog a través de 983bede permite la toma de control de la cuenta a través de la función de restablecimiento de contraseña porque SERVER_NAME no está configurado y, por lo tanto, un restablecimiento depende del encabezado HTTP del Host.

digest.description: employee record management system in php and mysql v1 was discovered to contain a SQL injection vulnerability via the loginerms.php endpoint.
digest.title: employee record management system in php and mysql v1 was discovered to contain a SQL injection vulnerability via the loginerms.php endpo...

descriptions.value: employee record management system in php and mysql v1 was discovered to contain a SQL injection vulnerability via the loginerms.php endpoint.
Se descubrió que el sistema de gestión de registros de empleados en PHP y MySQL v1 contenía una vulnerabilidad de inyección SQL a través del endpoint loginerms.php.

digest.description: Insufficient security mechanisms for created containers in educoder challenges v1.0 allow attackers to execute arbitrary code via injecting crafted content into a container.
digest.title: educoder challenges

descriptions.value: Insufficient security mechanisms for created containers in educoder challenges v1.0 allow attackers to execute arbitrary code via injecting crafted content into a container.

Los mecanismos de seguridad insuficientes para los contenedores creados en educoder challenges v1.0 y permiten a los atacantes ejecutar código arbitrario mediante la inyección de contenido manipulado en un contenedor.

digest.description: In RRC in Samsung Mobile Processor, Wearable Processor, and Modem Exynos 980, 990, 850, 1080, 2100, 1280, 2200, 1330, 1380, 1480, 2400, 1580, 9110, W920, W930, W1000, Modem 5123, Modem 5300, and Modem 5400, the lack of a length check leads to out-of-bounds writes.
digest.title: samsung exynos_1080_firmware Out-of-Bounds Write

descriptions.value: In RRC in Samsung Mobile Processor, Wearable Processor, and Modem Exynos 980, 990, 850, 1080, 2100, 1280, 2200, 1330, 1380, 1480, 2400, 1580, 9110, W920, W930, W1000, Modem 5123, Modem 5300, and Modem 5400, the lack of a length check leads to out-of-bounds writes.

En RRC en Samsung Mobile Processor, Wearable Processor, y Modem Exynos 980, 990, 850, 1080, 2100, 1280, 2200, 1330, 1380, 1480, 2400, 1580, 9110, W920, W930, W1000, módem 5123, módem 5300 y módem 5400, la falta de una verificación de longitud conduce a escrituras fuera de los límites.

digest.description: Missing Authorization vulnerability in Wikimedia Foundation Mediawiki - AbuseFilter Extension allows Unauthorized Access.This issue affects Mediawiki - AbuseFilter Extension: from 1.43.X before 1.43.2.
digest.title: Missing Authorization vulnerability in Wikimedia Foundation Mediawiki - AbuseFilter Extension allows Unauthorized Access.This issue affec...

descriptions.value: Missing Authorization vulnerability in Wikimedia Foundation Mediawiki - AbuseFilter Extension allows Unauthorized Access.This issue affects Mediawiki - AbuseFilter Extension: from 1.43.X before 1.43.2.

Vulnerabilidad de autorización faltante en Wikimedia Foundation Mediawiki - AbuseFilter Extension que permite acceso no autorizado. Este problema afecta a la extensión Mediawiki - AbuseFilter: desde 1.39.X hasta 1.39.13, desde 1.42.X hasta 1.42.7, desde 1.43.X hasta 1.43.2.

digest.description: Missing Authorization vulnerability in Wikimedia Foundation Mediawiki - AbuseFilter Extension allows Unauthorized Access.This issue affects Mediawiki - AbuseFilter Extension: from 1.43.X before 1.43.2.
digest.title: Missing Authorization vulnerability in Wikimedia Foundation Mediawiki - AbuseFilter Extension allows Unauthorized Access.This issue affec...

descriptions.value: Missing Authorization vulnerability in Wikimedia Foundation Mediawiki - AbuseFilter Extension allows Unauthorized Access.This issue affects Mediawiki - AbuseFilter Extension: from 1.43.X before 1.43.2.

:La vulnerabilidad de autorización faltante en Wikimedia Foundation Mediawiki - AbuseFilter Extension permite el acceso no autorizado. Este problema afecta a la extensión Mediawiki - AbuseFilter: desde 1.39.X hasta 1.39.13, desde 1.42.X hasta 1.42.7, desde 1.43.X hasta 1.43.2.
